plugin.name: ThreeS_ChaosSea
plugin.author: Joakim
plugin.description:
Chaos sea stepper: maps rooms on a 3D grid as you move, queues unexplored exits and walks to the nearest frontier room (BFS through known rooms). Shows a live map miniwindow with clickable buttons.
Commands: cs help cs enable start parsing rooms (do this in your start room) cs disable stop parsing cs step walk to next unexplored room (also: map window button) cs auto on|off keep stepping automatically, kill mobs on the way cs leave walk back to start (0 0 0) cs reset wipe the map and start over cs set <x> <y> <z> override current position cs find <x> <y> <z> print path to a coordinate cs win show/hide map window cs kill <name> what to kill when a mob shows up (default: mutant) cs exclude <mob long name> never attack this mob cs vacuum on|off loot rooms (default on) cs debug_all dump the room grid as text

trigger.name: cs_wall
trigger.match: ^You are unable to penetrate the wall that

muclient.script:
-- ============================================================ -- Chaos Sea explorer - -- ============================================================ local STEPPER_ID = "1f2e3d4c5b6a798887766554" local MIP_ID = "9a8b3c5d1e2f4a6b8c0d2e4f"
local rooms = {} -- rooms[z][x][y] = { exits = {dir=true}, } local frontier = {} -- LIFO list of { x=, y=, z=, dir= } local pos = { x = 0, y = 0, z = 0 } local enabled = false local auto = false local fighting = false local pending_mob = nil -- mob seen this room; attack decided at the prompt local idle_fight_prompts = 0 -- self-heal counter when combat fizzles out local armed = false -- a room was parsed; ok to auto-step on next prompt local plan = nil -- walking plan: one confirmed move at a time local vacuum = (GetVariable("vacuum") ~= "0") local killname = GetVariable("killname") or "mutant" local goal = GetVariable("goal") or "cask portal" local goals = {} local kill_delay = tonumber(GetVariable("kill_delay")) or 2.5 local paused = false local rest_below = tonumber(GetVariable("rest_below")) or 0 -- 0 = off local rest_secs = tonumber(GetVariable("rest_secs")) or 60 local resting = false local rest_until = 0 local goal_found = false local room_goal_idx = nil -- index in `goals` of the best match seen this room local room_goal_word = nil -- the matched word, acted on at the prompt local function parse_goals() goals = {} for w in goal:lower():gmatch("[%w_]+") do goals[#goals + 1] = w end end parse_goals() local excluded = {} -- mob long names never to attack local visible = (GetVariable("visible") ~= "0") local steps_done = 0
cs_flags = { item = false, gold = false, player = false }
local function note(s) ColourNote("red", "", ":: ", "gray", "", "CSS ", "red", "", ":: ", "silver", "", s) end
-- ---------- coordinates (diagonals fixed: x/y only) ---------- local DELTA = { n = {0,1,0}, s = {0,-1,0}, e = {1,0,0}, w = {-1,0,0}, u = {0,0,1}, d = {0,0,-1}, ne = {1,1,0}, nw = {-1,1,0}, se = {1,-1,0}, sw = {-1,-1,0}, north = {0,1,0}, south = {0,-1,0}, east = {1,0,0}, west = {-1,0,0}, up = {0,0,1}, down = {0,0,-1}, northeast = {1,1,0}, northwest = {-1,1,0}, southeast = {1,-1,0}, southwest = {-1,-1,0}, }
local function moved(p, dir) local d = DELTA[dir] if not d then return nil end return { x = p.x + d[1], y = p.y + d[2], z = p.z + d[3] } end
local function get_room(p) local zt = rooms[p.z]; if not zt then return nil end local xt = zt[p.x]; if not xt then return nil end return xt[p.y] end
local function add_room(p) rooms[p.z] = rooms[p.z] or {} rooms[p.z][p.x] = rooms[p.z][p.x] or {} if not rooms[p.z][p.x][p.y] then rooms[p.z][p.x][p.y] = { exits = {} } end return rooms[p.z][p.x][p.y] end
local function room_count() local n = 0 for _, zt in pairs(rooms) do for _, xt in pairs(zt) do for _ in pairs(xt) do n = n + 1 end end end return n end
local function add_exit(p, dir) local room = get_room(p) or add_room(p) if not room.exits[dir] then room.exits[dir] = true local target = moved(p, dir) if target and not get_room(target) then frontier[#frontier + 1] = { x = p.x, y = p.y, z = p.z, dir = dir } end end end
-- ---------- BFS through known rooms, returns dir list ---------- -- allow_up: if false/nil, the path never climbs 'up' (so exploration won't -- wander back onto an already-cleared floor). cs_leave passes true to go home. local function bfs(src, dst, allow_up) if src.x == dst.x and src.y == dst.y and src.z == dst.z then return {} end local key = function(p) return p.z .. "|" .. p.x .. "|" .. p.y end local came = { [key(src)] = { dir = false } } local queue, qi = { src }, 1 local found = nil while queue[qi] do local cur = queue[qi]; qi = qi + 1 if cur.x == dst.x and cur.y == dst.y and cur.z == dst.z then found = cur break end local room = get_room(cur) if room then for dir in pairs(room.exits) do if allow_up or (dir ~= "u" and dir ~= "up") then local nxt = moved(cur, dir) if nxt and get_room(nxt) and not came[key(nxt)] then came[key(nxt)] = { dir = dir, prev = cur } queue[#queue + 1] = nxt end end end end if qi > 50000 then break end end if not found then return nil end local path = {} local node = came[key(found)] while node and node.dir do table.insert(path, 1, node.dir) node = came[key(node.prev)] end return path end
-- ---------- walking (one confirmed move at a time) ---------- -- plan = { dirs = {...}, idx = n, awaiting = bool, kind = "explore"|"leave" }
local function parse_exits(short) local exit_desc = short:match("%((.*)%)") if exit_desc then -- the maze shifts: trust what the room says NOW over what we recorded local room = get_room(pos) or add_room(pos) room.exits = {} for exit in exit_desc:gmatch("[^,%s]+") do if exit == "out" then -- the way out of the sea, don't queue it elseif exit == "u" or exit == "up" then -- remember it for pathing back, but never queue it for exploring local room = get_room(pos) or add_room(pos) room.exits[exit] = true elseif DELTA[exit] then add_exit(pos, exit) if exit == "d" or exit == "down" then local t = moved(pos, exit) if t and not get_room(t) then note("DOWN exit here!") end end end end end end
local function get_seid() local s = tonumber(GetPluginVariable(MIP_ID, "seid")) if s then return s end local ser = GetPluginVariable(MIP_ID, "vmip_ser") or "" return tonumber(ser:match("%f[%w]SEID=(%d+)")) end
function cs_start_rest(seid) resting = true rest_until = os.time() + rest_secs note(string.format("Seid low (%s < %d) - resting %ds before moving on", tostring(seid), rest_below, rest_secs)) DoAfterSpecial(rest_secs, "cs_rest_over()", sendto.script) cs_draw() end
function cs_rest_over() if not resting then return end resting = false local seid = get_seid() if rest_below > 0 and seid and seid < rest_below then cs_start_rest(seid) return end note("Seid recovered - resuming") if enabled and not paused and not fighting then if plan then cs_advance() elseif auto then cs_step() end end cs_draw() end
-- the MIP feed knows the truth about combat: enemy_name set = fighting local function in_combat() local e = GetPluginVariable(MIP_ID, "enemy_name") return e ~= nil and e ~= "" end
function cs_advance() if not enabled or not plan or plan.awaiting or paused or resting then return end if fighting or in_combat() then fighting = true return end if plan.idx > #plan.dirs then local kind = plan.kind plan = nil if kind == "explore" then steps_done = steps_done + 1 if auto then armed = false; cs_step() end else note("arrived back at start") auto = false end cs_draw() return end plan.awaiting = true Send(plan.dirs[plan.idx]) end
function cs_on_room(short) if not enabled then return end if plan and plan.awaiting then -- the bot's own move arriving: always confirm it, even mid-pause local p2 = moved(pos, plan.dirs[plan.idx]) if p2 then pos = p2 end add_room(pos) plan.idx = plan.idx + 1 plan.awaiting = false if paused then parse_exits(short) -- it's the bot's own maze room: map it cs_draw() return end elseif paused then return -- frozen: rooms you walk through while paused are ignored elseif fighting then -- the bot didn't order this move: wimpy kicked in (HP retreat) paused = true note("WIMPY! Moved during combat - bot PAUSED. Walk back to the fight room,") note("then click Pause to continue (or 'cs set x y z' if unsure where you are).") cs_draw() return end cs_flags.item = false; cs_flags.gold = false; cs_flags.player = false room_goal_idx = nil; room_goal_word = nil pending_mob = nil parse_exits(short) armed = true cs_draw() end
-- the GOAL: a room with a cask (or whatever 'cs goal' is set to) local function cs_reach_goal(gw) -- target item (cask/portal) is in the room: just PAUSE the bot. paused is the -- robust stop - cs_step/cs_advance/cs_on_prompt/watchdog all honour it (goal_found -- did not, so scheduled steps walked out of the room). paused = true plan = nil pending_mob = nil room_goal_idx = nil; room_goal_word = nil -- handled; don't re-pause on unpause note(string.upper(gw) .. " found - bot PAUSED (click Pause / 'cs pause' to continue).") cs_draw() end
function cs_on_item(line) if not enabled or paused then return end cs_flags.item = true if not goal_found then local low = line:lower() for i, gw in ipairs(goals) do -- whole-word match: gw must be bounded by non-word chars (or line ends), -- so "cask" no longer fires on "casket"/"cascade". gw is alnum/underscore -- only (see parse_goals), so it needs no pattern-escaping. if low:find("%f[%w]" .. gw .. "%f[%W]") then -- record only the highest-priority goal in the room (lower index in -- `goals` = higher priority). The action runs at the prompt, so cask -- beats portal no matter which item line printed first. if not room_goal_idx or i < room_goal_idx then room_goal_idx = i room_goal_word = gw end break end end end end
function cs_blocked() if not enabled or not plan or not plan.awaiting then return end local d = plan.dirs[plan.idx] plan.awaiting = false local room = get_room(pos) if room and d then room.exits[d] = nil end note("blocked going " .. (d or "?") .. " - exit removed, replanning") if plan.entry then table.insert(frontier, 1, plan.entry) end -- don't lose the in-flight target plan = nil if auto then DoAfterSpecial(0.5, "cs_step()", sendto.script) end cs_draw() end
-- ---------- mobs / combat ---------- function cs_on_mob(name) if not enabled or fighting or paused then return end if excluded[name] then return end if name:match("Tibbers the bright calico cat") or name:match("otter") then return end -- don't attack yet: wait for the prompt so we know if a player is here pending_mob = killname end
function cs_on_player(name) if not enabled then return end local party = GetPluginVariable(STEPPER_ID, "party") if party then for member in party:gmatch("[^\n]+") do if name:find(member, 1, true) then return end end end cs_flags.player = true end
function cs_no_mob(name) if not (enabled and fighting) then return end if name ~= killname then return end -- only OUR target counts as room-clear if in_combat() then return end -- something is still hitting us fighting = false idle_fight_prompts = 0 if plan then DoAfterSpecial(0.5, "cs_advance()", sendto.script) elseif auto then DoAfterSpecial(0.5, "cs_step()", sendto.script) end cs_draw() end
function cs_killblow() if not (enabled and fighting) then return end -- wait kill_delay so your own killing-blow triggers act first DoAfterSpecial(kill_delay, "cs_after_kill()", sendto.script) end
function cs_after_kill() if not (enabled and fighting) then return end if in_combat() then -- still fighting the next one: check again soon instead of giving up DoAfterSpecial(2, "cs_after_kill()", sendto.script) return end -- the room may hold more mobs: try again; "There is no X here." resumes the walk Send("kill " .. killname) end
-- ---------- prompt: loot + keep the plan moving ---------- function cs_on_prompt() if not enabled or paused or resting then return end -- whole room is printed now: if a goal item was here, act on the -- highest-priority one (cask before portal), ignoring print order. if not goal_found and room_goal_idx then cs_reach_goal(room_goal_word) return end if pending_mob and not fighting and not in_combat() then local mob = pending_mob pending_mob = nil if cs_flags.player then note("player in the room - leaving the mob alone, moving on") else fighting = true Send("kill " .. mob) cs_draw() return end end if vacuum and not cs_flags.player and not fighting then if cs_flags.item then Send("!get all") end if cs_flags.gold then Send("!get coins") end cs_flags.item = false; cs_flags.gold = false end if fighting or in_combat() then if in_combat() then fighting = true idle_fight_prompts = 0 elseif fighting then -- flagged as fighting but MIP says no enemy (mob fled / killed by -- someone else): after a few prompts, probe the room to recover idle_fight_prompts = idle_fight_prompts + 1 if idle_fight_prompts >= 3 then idle_fight_prompts = 0 Send("kill " .. killname) end end return end if plan then cs_advance() elseif auto and armed then armed = false cs_step() end end
-- ---------- frontier selection: DOWN exits always win ---------- local function frontier_remove(i) table.remove(frontier, i) end
local function valid_entry(e) local from_room = get_room({ x = e.x, y = e.y, z = e.z }) local t = moved({ x = e.x, y = e.y, z = e.z }, e.dir) if t and not get_room(t) and from_room and from_room.exits[e.dir] then return t end return nil end
local function pop_frontier() -- 1. unexplored down exit in the CURRENT room: dive immediately local cur = get_room(pos) if cur then for _, dd in ipairs({ "d", "down" }) do if cur.exits[dd] then local t = moved(pos, dd) if t and not get_room(t) then for i = #frontier, 1, -1 do local e = frontier[i] if e.x == pos.x and e.y == pos.y and e.z == pos.z and (e.dir == "d" or e.dir == "down") then frontier_remove(i) end end return { x = pos.x, y = pos.y, z = pos.z, dir = dd }, t end end end end -- 2. newest queued down exit anywhere on the map for i = #frontier, 1, -1 do local e = frontier[i] if e.dir == "d" or e.dir == "down" then local t = valid_entry(e) frontier_remove(i) if t then return e, t end end end -- 3. normal: newest unexplored exit while #frontier > 0 do local e = frontier[#frontier] frontier[#frontier] = nil local t = valid_entry(e) if t then return e, t end end return nil end
-- ---------- stepping ---------- local stuck_since = nil local idle_ticks = 0 local awaiting_ticks = 0 local cs_last_sea_min = nil
function cs_watchdog() -- tick the sea-age timer even while idle/paused: redraw once per minute change if visible then local st = tonumber(GetVariable("cs_sea_time")) if st then local m = math.floor((os.time() - st) / 60) if m ~= cs_last_sea_min and m <= 60 then cs_last_sea_min = m; cs_draw() end end end if not enabled or paused or resting or goal_found then stuck_since = nil idle_ticks = 0 return end if fighting and not in_combat() then -- fight flag stuck but the mud says no enemy (missed killblow, fled mob...) stuck_since = stuck_since or os.time() if os.time() - stuck_since >= 5 then stuck_since = nil note("watchdog: combat seems over - checking the room") Send("kill " .. killname) end return end stuck_since = nil -- move sent but the room never arrived: re-glance to unstick the confirm if plan and plan.awaiting then awaiting_ticks = (awaiting_ticks or 0) + 1 if awaiting_ticks >= 3 then awaiting_ticks = 0 note("watchdog: move unconfirmed - glancing") Send("!glance") end return end awaiting_ticks = 0 -- auto mode but nothing happening at all for ~20s: nudge it if auto and not plan and not fighting and not in_combat() then idle_ticks = idle_ticks + 1 if idle_ticks >= 4 then idle_ticks = 0 note("watchdog: nudging the explorer") cs_step() end else idle_ticks = 0 end end
function cs_pause_toggle() paused = not paused if paused then note("PAUSED - click Pause again (or 'cs pause') to continue") else note("resuming") if enabled and not fighting and not in_combat() then if plan then cs_advance() elseif auto then DoAfterSpecial(0.5, "cs_step()", sendto.script) end end end cs_draw() end
function cs_step() if not enabled then note("not enabled - 'cs enable' first") return end if paused then note("paused - unpause first") return end if resting then note("resting (Seid low) - back in " .. math.max(0, rest_until - os.time()) .. "s") return end if rest_below > 0 then local seid = get_seid() if seid and seid < rest_below then cs_start_rest(seid) return end end if fighting or in_combat() then fighting = true note("in combat - will continue when the room is clear") return end if plan then cs_advance() return end local stash = {} local entry, target, path while true do entry, target = pop_frontier() if not entry then break end path = bfs(pos, { x = entry.x, y = entry.y, z = entry.z }) if path then break end stash[#stash + 1] = entry entry, target = nil, nil end -- unreachable exits go back at the BOTTOM of the pile, never lost for i = #stash, 1, -1 do table.insert(frontier, 1, stash[i]) end if not entry then if #stash > 0 then note(string.format("%d unexplored exits left but no path to any from [%d %d %d]", #stash, pos.x, pos.y, pos.z)) note("maze shifted or position off - walk around a bit, then 'cs auto on' to retry") else note("Out of rooms!") end auto = false cs_draw() return end if #stash > 0 then note(string.format("(%d unreachable exits kept for later)", #stash)) end path[#path + 1] = entry.dir plan = { dirs = path, idx = 1, awaiting = false, kind = "explore", entry = entry } note(string.format("[%d %d %d] -> [%d %d %d]: %d steps", pos.x, pos.y, pos.z, target.x, target.y, target.z, #path)) cs_advance() cs_draw() end
function cs_leave() if plan and plan.entry then table.insert(frontier, 1, plan.entry) end plan = nil auto = false local path = bfs(pos, { x = 0, y = 0, z = 0 }, true) -- going home may need to climb up if not path then note("no path back to start!") return end if #path == 0 then note("already at start") return end note("returning to 0 0 0 (" .. #path .. " steps)") plan = { dirs = path, idx = 1, awaiting = false, kind = "leave" } cs_advance() end
local function reset() rooms = {}; frontier = {} pos = { x = 0, y = 0, z = 0 } plan = nil; fighting = false; steps_done = 0 goal_found = false; paused = false add_room(pos) cs_draw() end
-- ---------- persistence ---------- local function save_state() local out = {} for z, zt in pairs(rooms) do for x, xt in pairs(zt) do for y, room in pairs(xt) do local ex = {} for d in pairs(room.exits) do ex[#ex + 1] = d end out[#out + 1] = z .. "|" .. x .. "|" .. y .. "|" .. table.concat(ex, ",") end end end SetVariable("rooms", table.concat(out, "\n")) local fr = {} for _, e in ipairs(frontier) do fr[#fr + 1] = e.z .. "|" .. e.x .. "|" .. e.y .. "|" .. e.dir end SetVariable("frontier", table.concat(fr, "\n")) SetVariable("pos", pos.x .. "|" .. pos.y .. "|" .. pos.z) SetVariable("killname", killname) SetVariable("visible", visible and "1" or "0") local exl = {} for n in pairs(excluded) do exl[#exl + 1] = n end SetVariable("excluded", table.concat(exl, "\n")) end
local function load_state() local r = GetVariable("rooms") if r and r ~= "" then for line in r:gmatch("[^\n]+") do local z, x, y, ex = line:match("^(-?%d+)|(-?%d+)|(-?%d+)|(.*)$") if z then local room = add_room({ x = tonumber(x), y = tonumber(y), z = tonumber(z) }) for d in ex:gmatch("[^,]+") do room.exits[d] = true end end end end local f = GetVariable("frontier") if f and f ~= "" then for line in f:gmatch("[^\n]+") do local z, x, y, d = line:match("^(-?%d+)|(-?%d+)|(-?%d+)|(.*)$") if z then frontier[#frontier + 1] = { x = tonumber(x), y = tonumber(y), z = tonumber(z), dir = d } end end end local p = GetVariable("pos") if p then local x, y, z = p:match("^(-?%d+)|(-?%d+)|(-?%d+)$") if x then pos = { x = tonumber(x), y = tonumber(y), z = tonumber(z) } end end local exl = GetVariable("excluded") if exl then for n in exl:gmatch("[^\n]+") do excluded[n] = true end end if not get_room(pos) then add_room(pos) end end
function OnPluginSaveState() save_state() cs_save_window() end
-- ============================================================ -- map miniwindow -- ============================================================ require "movewindow"
local WIN = "chaossea_" .. GetPluginID() local W, H = 300, 439 local windowinfo local CELL = 14 local MAPX, MAPY, MAPW, MAPH = 10, 151, 280, 224
local C = { bg = 0x101418, border = 0x604020, head = 0x40C0FF, room = 0x806040, roomline = 0xB09070, cur = 0x60FF60, front = 0x3070FF, text = 0xF0F0F0, dim = 0x909090, btn = 0x402818, btntext = 0xE0C8A0, down = 0x30C0F0, }
-- start a fresh sea (only while paused at the cask). number defaults to the -- last one used; change it with the "Set #" button (1-120). function cs_new_sea() if not paused then note("New Sea only works while paused (at the cask)") return end local n = tonumber(GetVariable("cs_seanum")) or 1 note("opening cask & starting new sea #" .. n) Send("open cask") DoAfter(1, "retreat from the sea") DoAfter(2, "unsetsea") DoAfter(3, "setsea " .. n) DoAfter(4, "enter sea") SetVariable("cs_sea_time", tostring(os.time())) -- start the sea-age clock cs_draw() end
function cs_set_seanum() local s = utils.inputbox("Sea number (1-120):", "New sea number", GetVariable("cs_seanum") or "") if not s then return end local n = tonumber(s) if n and n >= 1 and n <= 120 then SetVariable("cs_seanum", tostring(math.floor(n))) note("sea number set to " .. math.floor(n)) cs_draw() elseif s:gsub("%s", "") ~= "" then note("sea number must be 1-120") end end
function cs_button(flags, id) if id == "tab_Area" or id == "tab_Deadman" then local x = windowinfo and windowinfo.window_left or 0 local y = windowinfo and windowinfo.window_top or 0 visible = false SetVariable("visible", "0") WindowShow(WIN, false) local rc = CallPlugin(STEPPER_ID, "ab_show_at", tostring(x), tostring(y), id:sub(5)) if rc ~= 0 then note("area bot plugin not available") visible = true SetVariable("visible", "1") cs_draw() end return elseif id == "tab_Chaos" then return elseif id == "b_power" then cs_interface(enabled and "disable" or "enable") elseif id == "b_pause" then cs_pause_toggle() elseif id == "b_step" then cs_step() elseif id == "b_auto" then cs_interface(auto and "auto off" or "auto on") elseif id == "b_leave" then cs_leave() elseif id == "b_reset" then cs_interface("reset") elseif id == "b_loot" then cs_interface(vacuum and "vacuum off" or "vacuum on") elseif id == "b_dminus" then cs_interface("delay " .. (kill_delay - 0.5)) elseif id == "b_dplus" then cs_interface("delay " .. (kill_delay + 0.5)) elseif id == "b_hide" then cs_interface("win") elseif id == "b_newsea" then cs_new_sea() elseif id == "b_seanum" then cs_set_seanum() end end
-- called by the area-bot plugin when its Chaos tab hands over to us function cs_show_at(x, y) if not windowinfo then windowinfo = movewindow.install(WIN, 8, 0) end x, y = tonumber(x), tonumber(y) if x and y then windowinfo.window_left, windowinfo.window_top = x, y end visible = true SetVariable("visible", "1") cs_draw() end
local function draw_btn(id, x1, y1, x2, y2, label, active, tooltip) WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, x1, y1, x2, y2, active and 0x707030 or C.btn) WindowRectOp(WIN, 1, x1, y1, x2, y2, active and 0x90C040 or C.border) WindowText(WIN, "fb", label, x1 + math.floor((x2 - x1) / 2) - #label * 4, y1 + 3, 0, 0, active and 0x80FFFF or C.btntext) WindowAddHotspot(WIN, id, x1, y1, x2, y2, "", "", "cs_button", "", "", tooltip or label, 1, 0) end
function cs_draw() SetVariable("auto", auto and "1" or "0") SetVariable("cs_enabled", enabled and "1" or "0") if not visible then return end if not windowinfo then windowinfo = movewindow.install(WIN, 8, 0) -- default bottom right, draggable end WindowCreate(WIN, windowinfo.window_left, windowinfo.window_top, W, H, windowinfo.window_mode, windowinfo.window_flags, C.bg) WindowFont(WIN, "f", "Lucida Console", 9, false, false, false, false) WindowFont(WIN, "fb", "Lucida Console", 9, true, false, false, false) WindowRectOp(WIN, 1, 0, 0, W, H, C.border) WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, 1, 1, W - 1, 17, 0x402818) WindowText(WIN, "fb", "Bots", 10, 3, 0, 0, C.head) movewindow.add_drag_handler(WIN, 0, 0, W, 17, miniwin.cursor_hand) local tw = math.floor((W - 2) / 3) for i, t in ipairs({ "Area", "Chaos", "Deadman" }) do local x1 = 1 + (i - 1) * tw local sel = (t == "Chaos") WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, x1, 18, x1 + tw - 1, 36, sel and 0x604020 or 0x301E12) WindowRectOp(WIN, 1, x1, 18, x1 + tw - 1, 36, 0x604020) WindowText(WIN, sel and "fb" or "f", t, x1 + math.floor(tw / 2) - #t * 4, 22, 0, 0, sel and C.head or 0xD0D0D0) WindowAddHotspot(WIN, "tab_" .. t, x1, 18, x1 + tw - 1, 36, "", "", "cs_button", "", "", t, 1, 0) end
-- status banner: what is the bot doing RIGHT NOW local modetxt, modecol if not enabled then modetxt, modecol = "OFF - click ON in your start room", C.dim elseif paused then modetxt, modecol = "PAUSED - click Pause to continue", 0x40C0FF elseif resting then modetxt, modecol = string.format("RESTING - Seid low, %ds left", math.max(0, rest_until - os.time())), 0xD0A000 elseif fighting then modetxt, modecol = "FIGHTING - resumes when clear", 0x5050F0 elseif plan then modetxt, modecol = "WALKING...", 0x40C0FF elseif auto then modetxt, modecol = "AUTO-EXPLORING", 0x60E060 else modetxt, modecol = "READY - Step or Auto", 0x20C0C0 end WindowText(WIN, "fb", modetxt, 10, 39, 0, 0, modecol) WindowText(WIN, "f", string.format("pos %d,%d level %d rooms %d left %d dives %d", pos.x, pos.y, 1 - pos.z, room_count(), #frontier, steps_done), 10, 54, 0, 0, C.dim)
-- buttons row 1: the workflow, left to right draw_btn("b_power", 10, 69, 62, 89, enabled and "ON" or "OFF", enabled, enabled and "Stop mapping rooms" or "Start here: enables mapping in this room") draw_btn("b_step", 66, 69, 118, 89, "Step", false, "Walk to the next unexplored room") draw_btn("b_auto", 122, 69, 174, 89, "Auto", auto, "Explore + fight on its own until the cask") draw_btn("b_pause", 178, 69, 234, 89, "Pause", paused, "Hold everything - click again to continue") draw_btn("b_leave", 238, 69, 290, 89, "Leave", false, "Walk back to the start room") -- buttons row 2: options draw_btn("b_reset", 10, 93, 76, 113, "Reset", false, "Wipe the map - current room becomes start") draw_btn("b_loot", 80, 93, 146, 113, "Loot", vacuum, "Pick up items and coins on/off") draw_btn("b_dminus", 150, 93, 172, 113, "-", false, "Shorter pause after kills") WindowText(WIN, "f", string.format("%.1fs", kill_delay), 178, 96, 0, 0, C.text) draw_btn("b_dplus", 212, 93, 234, 113, "+", false, "Longer pause after kills") draw_btn("b_hide", 252, 93, 290, 113, "X", false, "Hide window ('cs win' brings it back)") -- what it hunts WindowText(WIN, "f", "kills: " .. killname .. " stops at: " .. goal, 10, 119, 0, 0, C.dim) WindowText(WIN, "f", "('cs kill <n>' / 'cs goal <n>' to change)", 10, 132, 0, 0, 0x504540)
-- map of current level, centered on player WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, MAPX, MAPY, MAPX + MAPW, MAPY + MAPH, 0x080A0C) WindowRectOp(WIN, 1, MAPX, MAPY, MAPX + MAPW, MAPY + MAPH, C.border) local cols, rows = math.floor(MAPW / CELL), math.floor(MAPH / CELL) local x0 = pos.x - math.floor(cols / 2) local y0 = pos.y + math.floor(rows / 2) -- north = up local zt = rooms[pos.z] or {}
-- frontier targets on this level local fronts = {} for _, e in ipairs(frontier) do local t = moved({ x = e.x, y = e.y, z = e.z }, e.dir) if t and t.z == pos.z then fronts[t.x .. "|" .. t.y] = true end end
for cx = 0, cols - 1 do for cy = 0, rows - 1 do local wx, wy = x0 + cx, y0 - cy local px, py = MAPX + cx * CELL, MAPY + cy * CELL local xt = zt[wx] local room = xt and xt[wy] if room then WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, px + 2, py + 2, px + CELL - 2, py + CELL - 2, C.room) -- exit connectors for dir in pairs(room.exits) do local d = DELTA[dir] if d and d[3] == 0 then local mx, my = px + CELL / 2, py + CELL / 2 WindowLine(WIN, mx, my, mx + d[1] * (CELL / 2), my - d[2] * (CELL / 2), C.roomline, 0, 1) elseif d and d[3] ~= 0 then WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, px + CELL - 5, py + 3, px + CELL - 3, py + 5, C.down) end end end if fronts[wx .. "|" .. wy] then WindowRectOp(WIN, 1, px + 3, py + 3, px + CELL - 3, py + CELL - 3, C.front) end if wx == pos.x and wy == pos.y then WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, px + 4, py + 4, px + CELL - 4, py + CELL - 4, C.cur) end end end WindowText(WIN, "f", "you", MAPX + 4, MAPY + MAPH + 4, 0, 0, C.cur) WindowText(WIN, "f", "frontier", MAPX + 40, MAPY + MAPH + 4, 0, 0, C.front) WindowText(WIN, "f", "blue dot = down exit", MAPX + 110, MAPY + MAPH + 4, 0, 0, C.dim) -- sea timer: time since the last New Sea click (unsetsea only works after 60 min) local st = tonumber(GetVariable("cs_sea_time")) if st then local elm = math.floor((os.time() - st) / 60) local left = 60 - elm if left > 0 then WindowText(WIN, "f", string.format("Sea age %dm new sea in %dm", elm, left), 10, 397, 0, 0, 0x40C0FF) else WindowText(WIN, "f", "Ready for a new sea", 10, 397, 0, 0, 0x60E060) end else WindowText(WIN, "f", "no active sea timer", 10, 397, 0, 0, C.dim) end -- new-sea controls (only act while paused; lit when usable) local sn = tonumber(GetVariable("cs_seanum")) or 1 draw_btn("b_newsea", 10, 413, 168, 433, "New Sea #" .. sn, paused, "Retreat, unset, set & enter a new sea (only while paused)") draw_btn("b_seanum", 174, 413, 238, 433, "Set #", false, "Set the sea number (1-120)") WindowShow(WIN, true) end
-- ============================================================ -- command interface -- ============================================================ function cs_interface(args) args = (args or ""):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") if args == "" then Note([[ Chaos sea stepper: cs enable|disable parse rooms on/off (enable in your start room) cs step walk to next unexplored room cs auto on|off keep stepping, kill mobs on the way cs leave walk back to 0 0 0 cs reset wipe map cs win show/hide map cs set/find <x> <y> <z> cs kill <name> cs exclude <mob long name> cs vacuum on|off cs goal <word> stop + open it when seen (default: cask) cs delay <secs> pause after killing blows (default 2.5s) cs rest <seid> [secs] rest when Seid drops below <seid> (0 = off) cs pause hold everything / continue (also the Pause button)]]) elseif args == "enable" then enabled = true goal_found = false paused = false resting = false if not get_room(pos) then add_room(pos) end note("enabled - glance to map this room, then 'cs step' or 'cs auto on'") Send("!glance") elseif args == "disable" then enabled = false; auto = false; note("disabled") elseif args == "reset" then reset(); note("map reset") elseif args == "step" then cs_step() elseif args == "auto on" then enabled = true; auto = true; goal_found = false note("auto-exploring (kill: " .. killname .. ", stops at: " .. goal .. ")") cs_step() elseif args == "auto off" then auto = false; note("auto off") elseif args == "pause" then cs_pause_toggle() elseif args == "leave" then cs_leave() elseif args == "win" then visible = not visible SetVariable("visible", visible and "1" or "0") if visible then cs_draw() else WindowShow(WIN, false) end elseif args == "debug_all" then Note(string.format("Current position %d %d %d", pos.x, pos.y, pos.z)) for z, zt in pairs(rooms) do Note("Level " .. z) for x, xt in pairs(zt) do for y, room in pairs(xt) do local ex = {} for d in pairs(room.exits) do ex[#ex + 1] = d end Note(string.format(" [ %d %d ] : %s", x, y, table.concat(ex, ", "))) end end end elseif args == "vacuum on" or args == "vacuum off" then vacuum = (args == "vacuum on") SetVariable("vacuum", vacuum and "1" or "0") note("looting: " .. (vacuum and "on" or "off")) else local parts = {} for w in args:gmatch("%S+") do parts[#parts + 1] = w end if parts[1] == "set" then pos.x = tonumber(parts[2]) or pos.x pos.y = tonumber(parts[3]) or pos.y pos.z = tonumber(parts[4]) or pos.z add_room(pos) note(string.format("position set to %d %d %d", pos.x, pos.y, pos.z)) cs_draw() elseif parts[1] == "find" then local path = bfs(pos, { x = tonumber(parts[2]) or 0, y = tonumber(parts[3]) or 0, z = tonumber(parts[4]) or 0 }, true) Note("Result is: " .. (path and table.concat(path, " ") or "no path")) elseif parts[1] == "kill" then killname = parts[2] or "mutant"; note("kill target: " .. killname) elseif parts[1] == "rest" then rest_below = tonumber(parts[2]) or 0 if parts[3] then rest_secs = math.max(10, math.min(600, tonumber(parts[3]) or 60)) end SetVariable("rest_below", tostring(rest_below)) SetVariable("rest_secs", tostring(rest_secs)) if rest_below > 0 then note("rest when Seid < " .. rest_below .. " (for " .. rest_secs .. "s at a time)") else resting = false note("seid rest: off") end elseif parts[1] == "delay" then kill_delay = math.max(0.5, math.min(10, tonumber(parts[2]) or 2.5)) SetVariable("kill_delay", tostring(kill_delay)) note("post-kill delay: " .. kill_delay .. "s") elseif parts[1] == "goal" then goal = args:gsub("^goal%s+", "") goal_found = false parse_goals() SetVariable("goal", goal) note("goal: stop when any of these is in the room: " .. goal) elseif parts[1] == "exclude" then local name = args:gsub("^exclude%s+", "") excluded[name] = true; note("excluded: " .. name) else note("unknown command '" .. args .. "' - 'cs' for help") end end cs_draw() end
function cs_save_window() if windowinfo then movewindow.save_state(WIN) end end
function OnPluginInstall() load_state() AddTimer("cs_watchdog", 0, 0, 5, "", timer_flag.Enabled + timer_flag.Replace, "cs_watchdog") cs_draw() end
function OnPluginDisable() WindowShow(WIN, false) end function OnPluginEnable() cs_draw() end
